description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a robust, metallic head featuring a rugged, weathered texture and adorned with gold rivet-like studs along its sides. The head is rectangular with sharply pointed ends, giving it a menacing, industrial appearance. The central face of the hammer head displays a circular emblem or medallion, possibly decorative or symbolic. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of dark wood, reinforced with metal bands and a spiked collar near the head for added grip and durability. The base of the handle is capped with a rounded, metallic pommel, providing balance and preventing slippage. This hammer is designed for heavy impact tasks and would be suitable for demolition or ceremonial use in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A large, rugged sledgehammer with a metallic, studded head and a reinforced wooden handle, featuring a spiked collar and a decorative emblem.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face of the hammer head with its circular emblem, gold studs, and pointed ends, as well as the spiked collar on the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rectangular profile of the hammer head, the alignment of the gold studs, and the length of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the opposite face of the hammer head with similar emblem and studs, and the spiked collar detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the other rectangular profile of the hammer head and the handle's length, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a dark finish, reinforced by a spiked metal collar near the head and a rounded metallic pommel at the base; appears textured for grip.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of steel, featuring pointed ends, gold rivet-like studs along the sides, and a central circular emblem on each striking face.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible surface wear and scratches on the metal head, giving it a weathered, used appearance.
